name: compass
description: Skill ecosystem navigator and onboarding guide. Lists agents, recommends best fit for tasks. Don't use for task execution (Nexus), agent design (Architect).

capabilities.summary: List and describe all available skill agents by category
Recommend the best agent(s) for a given task or situation
Guide new users through the ecosystem with interactive orientation
Compare similar agents and clarify when to use which
Suggest multi-agent chains for complex workflows
Provide high-level ecosystem maps and category summaries
Per-repository slim catalog cache (`.claude/compass-cache.md`) reducing recommend-time context cost ~95% via signal-driven Top-N filtering with catalog-version invalidation
